summary: Completed testing of Inventory Sync Engine for Channel Manager v2. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend Sync Jobs tab and Job Detail dialog tested successfully with all new features working correctly.

minor.issue: Old format jobs (with 'completed' status) lack new fields like batched_at, total_changes_detected - this is expected backward compatibility

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility issue

action_items: Optional: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for better accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: StatusBadge correctly handles all new statuses: pending, batched, dispatched, succeeded, retrying, manual_review
Delta stats (Algılanan/Birleştirilen) show coalescing results accurately
Retry button shows for failed jobs as expected
HotelRunner sandbox 404 errors are properly handled and displayed
seed_data_creation: Triggered new inventory and rates sync jobs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Sync Engine v2 fully tested. All API endpoints working (/sync/inventory, /sync/rates, /sync/jobs, /sync/jobs/{id}, /sync/jobs/{id}/events, /sync/manual-review, manual-review retry/dismiss). Frontend Integration Hub Sync Jobs tab renders job list with change type badges, delta stats, and clickable job detail dialog showing lifecycle timeline, stats grid, events list with error details, and retry button for failed jobs.

backend_apis.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/sync/invent: Creates sync job with pending→batched→dispatched lifecycle - WORKING
backend_apis.GET /api/channel-manager/v2/sync/jobs: Lists all sync jobs with new status fields - WORKING
backend_apis.GET /api/channel-manager/v2/sync/jobs/{j: Returns job detail with events and event_count - WORKING
backend_apis.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/sync/manual: Endpoint exists and returns proper error for invalid job - WORKING
Endpoint exists and returns proper error for invalid job - WORKING

frontend_ui.sync_jobs_tab: Renders sync history with change type badges and delta stats - WORKING
frontend_ui.job_detail_dialog: Opens on row click showing lifecycle timeline, stats grid, events list, retry button - WORKING
frontend_ui.status_badges: Renders correctly for all new statuses - WORKING
